title: Ubiquiti UNAS Pro 4
description: The Ubiquiti UNAS-Pro-4 is a network storage device in a 1U rackmount form factor with (4) bays for 2.5/3.5" hard drives , (2) slots for M.2 NVME SSDs , (2) SFP+ slots and (1) 1Gbit port. The device is powered by a quad-core ARM Cortex-A57 processor paired with 8GB of RAM and offers the option of redundant power using the USP-RPS Device Power cable Rackmount installation accessories
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces Number of HDD slots 4 M.2 slots 2 LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Optical interfaces (2) 10Gbps Other features Bluetooth Power Power type Mains power (230V), UniFi SmartPower RPS Redundant power supply Yes Max. power consumption [W] 150 Physical characteristics Design Rackmount "U" positions 1 Operating temperature [°C] 5 up to 40 Weight [kg] 6,7 Width [mm] 442 Height [mm] 44 Depth [mm] 400 Hardware RAM memory size [GB] 8 CPU ARM Cortex-A57
